problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
hypothesis: Combining Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
